title: catevala cooperi
side_effects: Catevala cooperi can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory issues. In severe cases, misuse of the plant can lead to liver damage, kidney problems, and even seizures. Additionally, excessive consumption of catevala cooperi extracts may cause stomach ulcers, diarrhea, and an increased heart rate. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these adverse effects.
